message:
perf(coordinator): reduce lock contention during agent state updates

Moves status monitoring IO operations outside the critical section to
avoid blocking readers during updateAgentStates. Status checks can
involve pane output capture and parsing, which are relatively slow
operations that shouldn't hold the coordinator lock.

Changes:
- Pre-calculate all agent status updates in a slice before acquiring lock
- Acquire lock only for the map updates and event emission
- Skip user panes during pre-calculation phase (unchanged behavior)

This improves responsiveness of GetAgents and GetAgentState calls which
share the same mutex, particularly important for dashboard rendering.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
